title: cleistocactus hyalacanthus subsp. tarijensis
intro: Cleistocactus hyalacanthus subsp. tarijensis, also known as the 'Giant Ball Cactus', is a type of flowering cactus native to Bolivia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits associated with Cleistocactus hyalacanthus subsp. tarijensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, or ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
